titleStmt.title: SII 22.586: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 586. (A.R. No. 586 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, EḌAPAÑJANI, Kāśi-Viśvēśvara temple-On the base of the verandah in its front

summary.p: This consists of disjointed pieces of two inscriptions one being that of Kulōttuṅga I with the introduction Pugaḻsūḻnda-puṇari, etc.

The first piece is dated in the 29th year of the king. One of the pieces mentions a kāṇiyāḷan of Karkaḍūr in Puli-nāḍu a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. Another refers to one Rājēndramallar and Śrīpatināyaṉ, the donor of an ornament to the deity, while a third piece makes mention of a gift of 400 kuḻi of land under the big tank by Vikramaśōḻa-gāmuṇḍan and Nāgayaṉ. It is not known to whose reigns these are to be assigned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻ cūḷnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemi Aḷavun tannemi na
nniyāṭai naṉṉilappāvai taṉimaiyun tavirttup puṉita naṟtirumaṇi makuṭa muriṟai

pa vilaṅkiya teṉṉavan karuntalai paruntalait tiṭattan ponnakar puṟattiṭaikki
ṇṭala muñ ciṅkaṇa meṉṉum paraṇi yiraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaikkoṇṭaruḷi Ī

lāttuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Āvatu Irupattonpatāvatu jayaṅkoṇ
ikkācu munṟu nellu muppatiṉ kalamum yāṇṭu Irupattonpatāvatu muta

centirarmallar Uṭaimai Aṭaṅkalum cantirātittavarai cipaṇṭāramāka ku
ṭuttom Innāḷil Enmakan cipatināyan Uṭaiyārkku cāttina patakkam

syavaramuṭaiyārkkup peri Erikiḻ vaiytta kuḻi nānūṟum Āka Ājjanā yama kāmuṇṭaṉ
Ivar makkaḷ vikkiramacoḻa kāmuṇṭanum ṉākayaṉum Aṅka kaṭāṟatevan
ḻi Itu kaṟkkaṭurom ceytu kuṭuttom Itu Aḻivu ceyvān kurāṟpacu konṟān pāvattu paṭuvān Aṟamaṟavaṟkka Aṟama

jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puli nāṭṭuk kaṟkaṭur kāṇiyāḷan
perumpāṇap pāṭiyā

mallaṉ vantetirvilaṅka Avaṉ Āṉaiyum kutiraiyum peṇṭirpaṇṭāramum—ḷa mutama kottirattu māramiyanu— ṉ ceṉaiyaip piṉṉatuvākki Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakka—ṭu vijaiya Abhiṣekaṅ ceytu virarciṅkācanattu viṟṟiru
—ṭutten Iruvar devarkku matyaānattil Oru canti nānā
Digital edition of SII 22.586 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
